recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT | Platform Demo
recent.summary: Medik8's Lindsey and Monika received a platform demo from Mukul Varshney, primarily focusing on the Funnel Builder for landing page creation and A/B testing for paid media campaigns. Monika inquired about technical implementation, GA4 integration, branding customization, and the ability to run multi-variant A/B tests, confirming the $2k/month pricing with a 90-day opt-out period. Next steps involve Mukul providing technical documentation for Medik8's developer to review.
action_items: Provide technical documentation for Medik8's developer to review
Lindsey to coordinate internally on legal and tech approvals
Ensure brand consistency for US market launch

recent.title: Catch-up: Medik8 + FERMAT | Follow-up Call
recent.participants: Mukul Varshney (mukul@fermatcommerce.com), Lindsey Shin (lindsey.shin@medik8.com), Danielle Finn (danielle.finn@medik8.com)
recent.summary: Lindsey Shin from Medik8 re-engaged with Mukul Varshney, indicating an internal deadline of May to adopt an experimentation platform for optimizing sampling strategies and A/B testing, and mentioned competitors like Replo and Shogun. Mukul demonstrated the platform's funnel builder, showcasing gift-with-purchase functionality and branding customization, while Lindsey requested a business case/ROI calculator for internal budget approval and pricing.
action_items: Send follow-up email with pricing information
Include preview links for the two demo funnels in the recap email
Create an ROI calculator/business case for Medik8
Schedule a follow-up demo with Lindsey and Head of Digital Monica
Prepare a comparison of FERMAT vs. Replo and Shogun

recent.title: Call with Medik8 - Kelly Walter
recent.summary: Ben Potesky from FERMAT left a voicemail for Kelly Walter at Medik8, following up on an email sent on the 11th titled 'Medicaid CRO'. He requested her feedback on the email.

calls.analysis: Medik8 is a new account currently in the onboarding phase. Two substantive calls occurred in February 2026 covering platform demos, integration setup, and campaign strategy. Lindsey Shin is the primary contact with an internal May deadline to select a landing page platform, evaluating FERMAT against Replo and Shogun.

slack.analysis: Medik8's Slack channel (#fermat-x-medik8) is very active with daily communication. The brand team (Lindsey, Danielle, Jiyoon) is actively sharing assets, requesting integrations (Meta, TikTok), and discussing custom domain setup. Pulkit is providing detailed call recaps and action items. New team member Jiyoon Cha joined on March 26 asking about design customization capabilities.
